source: Live sim refresh (Regime B + intra-row pipelining + softmax row-parallel, Layout A) on 2026-04-25
note: Regenerate via gen_expected_cycles.py after any sim-model change. AH configs (attn_head) are manually maintained — refresh after running test.py --model attention. The 2026-04-25 entries reflect the softmax row-parallel fix (azurelily/IMC/scheduler_stats/scheduler.py:_run_softmax_exp/_run_softmax_norm now multiply per-row latency by rows_per_lane=ceil(rows/W_softmax) so the outer rows axis is W-parallel, in addition to the pre-existing within-row /W split). 2026-04-25 ADVISORY MARKING: For AH configs (attn_head), this file is now ADVISORY ONLY — the canonical Stage 1 gate uses Fmax-independent counters (see expected_counters.json + run_checks.py --gate counters). Cycle values here are derived from a placeholder Fmax (no VTR data yet); they remain useful as diagnostic but are no longer load-bearing. DIMM-top + FC Phase-2 configs continue to gate on cycles (those have real Fmax from prior VTR runs).

azurelily_dimm_top_d64_c128.todo: Stage names map to Azure-Lily modules: score=mac_qk, softmax=clb_softmax (S_LOAD+S_INV+S_NORM), wsum=mac_sv. Residuals annotated in phase5_known_deltas.json.

nldpe_attn_head_d64_c128.note: Captured from azurelily/IMC/test.py --model attention --seq_length 128 --head_dim 64 --imc_file configs/nl_dpe.json post-2026-04-25 softmax row-parallel fix in azurelily/IMC/scheduler_stats/scheduler.py (_run_softmax_exp/_run_softmax_norm now multiply per-row latency by rows_per_lane=ceil(rows/W) so the outer rows axis is W=16 parallel; the pre-existing within-row /W col-parallel split is preserved). Pre-2026-04-25 (intra-row pipelining only): softmax_exp=650, softmax_norm=376, e2e=13955. Post-fix: softmax_exp 650→41 (~16× drop, matches expected sim/RTL alignment for the W=16 attention head), softmax_norm 376→24 (~16× drop), e2e 13955→12993. Stages mac_qk / mac_sv unchanged (different sim path: gemm_log not _run_softmax_*). linear_qkv = max(linear_Q, linear_K, linear_V) = 23553.33 ns (parallel arms). Cycles = round(ns / t_clk) with t_clk = 9.7182 ns (Fmax=102.9 MHz).

azurelily_attn_head_d64_c128.note: Captured from azurelily/IMC/test.py --model attention --seq_length 128 --head_dim 64 --imc_file configs/azure_lily.json post-2026-04-25 softmax row-parallel fix in azurelily/IMC/scheduler_stats/scheduler.py (_run_softmax_exp/_run_softmax_norm: rows_per_lane multiplier; AL else-branch additionally gains the rows_per_lane scaling that was missing pre-fix). Pre-2026-04-25 (intra-row pipelining only): softmax_exp=188, softmax_norm=750, e2e=7203. Post-fix: softmax_exp 188→12 (~16× drop), softmax_norm 750→47 (~16× drop), e2e 7203→6324. Stages mac_qk / mac_sv unchanged (different sim path: gemm_dsp not _run_softmax_*). linear_qkv = max(linear_Q, linear_K, linear_V) = 45506.56 ns (parallel arms). Cycles = round(ns / t_clk) with t_clk = 11.3766 ns (Fmax=87.9 MHz).
